title: Port >32767 returns Unavailable instead of InvalidUri
description: ?server=host:40000 (or WOLFHSM_SERVER=host:40000) passes make_transport validation (parses as u16) but fails at Client::connect time because wolfhsm's C TCP transport stores port as i16 and rejects values >32767 with wolfhsm::Error::BadArgs. ensure_connected maps all Client::connect failures to SecretError::Unavailable. SecretError::Unavailable documents 'retrying may succeed', so callers with retry-on-Unavailable logic will loop forever on a permanently misconfigured port. Fix: add port > 32767 guard in make_transport and return SecretError::InvalidUri.
